business.name: Assured Thermal and Plumbing
business.tagline: Reliable Heating and Plumbing You Can Trust

sample_reviews.author: James R
sample_reviews.text: Absolutely brilliant service from start to finish. New boiler installed efficiently and at a great price. Highly recommend Assured Thermal and Plumbing.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Called them out for an emergency leak and they arrived within the hour. Professional, tidy, and fixed the problem quickly. Couldn't ask for more.

sample_reviews.author: David T
sample_reviews.text: Used Assured Thermal for a full central heating upgrade. The work was top quality and the team were courteous and knowledgeable throughout.

brand.usp: Assured Thermal and Plumbing combines specialist thermal knowledge with expert plumbing to keep Manchester homes warm, efficient, and running smoothly all year round.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Trusted Heating and Plumbing Experts
brand.about_paragraph: We're Assured Thermal and Plumbing, a Manchester-based team passionate about delivering reliable, high-quality heating and plumbing solutions to homes and businesses across Greater Manchester. Whether it's a new boiler installation, a heating system upgrade, or an emergency repair, we bring the same level of care and expertise to every job. We're fully Gas Safe registered, and our reputation is built on honest advice, quality workmanship, and prompt, friendly service.
